query:
SELECT projeto, COUNT(*) as contratos, SUM(CAST(valorVenda AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as vgv
FROM contratos c
JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id
WHERE c.distrato = 0
GROUP BY projeto
ORDER BY contratos DESC
LIMIT 10;
